TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Hacining, title = Hacining, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hacining} }

S.FORM: Hacining Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko Hacining a niyaro', 319 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 573 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 39% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 225 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 61% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 348 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 20%, Amis 12%, Tayal 5%, Puyuma 1%, Kebalan 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ńßa ¶iniŇč itiniaj i *i °an ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u ńßa ¶iniŇč a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, amis **%, taja…ĺ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, k…ôb~b~va…ĺan *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Hacining Itiniay i Ji'an Cen no Hualien ko Hacining a niyaro', 319 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 573 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 39% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 225 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 61% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 348 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Truku 20%, Amis 12%, Tayal 5%, Puyuma 1%, Kebalan 1%, roma 1%.
S.PHON: ńßa ¶iniŇč itiniaj i *i °an ¶…ôn no~u ńßo~u~ua…ĺi…ôn ko~u ńßa ¶iniŇč a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin , po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u tro~u~uko~u~u **%, amis **%, taja…ĺ *%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *%, k…ôb~b~va…ĺan *%, ro~uma *%.
